claim: Integrating real-time search into LLM agents improves factuality and reduces hallucinations on current events and dynamic information
actionable: For factuality-critical agents, add real-time search integration as a grounding mechanism for knowledge cutoff limitations

claim: Search-augmented agents trade increased latency and cost for improved accuracy on real-world, time-sensitive queries
actionable: Evaluate latency and cost implications when adding search; consider selective triggering for uncertainty detection
